chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.S-259 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.773/2024 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Deferred for the time being. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E M.Ali*
